UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNEELY, JR., JESSE J. MCNEELY, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 129 REY ST, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
